cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Mr. Tulsi Hansda, sir? Your cylinder booking is due for renewal, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number? I didn't expect a call from Hindustan Petroleum Gas.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm calling from Hindustan Petroleum Gas, sir. We have your details in our system for regular cylinder bookings. Shall I assist you with placing an order, Achha?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, fine. Yes, I need to book a cylinder. But how do I know this is a genuine call and not some scam?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Absolutely understandable, sir. For your security, I must inform you that you can book your cylinder through our official app, website, or IVR system. We don't take payment details over the call, Thik hai?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 51s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.
